positive: A stylized, minimalist woodland silhouette scene featuring various types of trees (oak, pine, birch) forming a complex, interwoven pattern across the composition. Include simple, elegant woodland elements such as stylized deer, rabbits, and forest flora like mushrooms and ferns. The overall mood should be whimsical yet sophisticated, suitable for autumn or nature themes. Use a limited color palette of deep teal, burnt orange, and muted sage green, rendered as clean, solid silhouettes with high contrast against a neutral background. The composition must be centrally arranged with clear negative space around the edges, optimized for repeating print pattern visibility. Vector art style, highly detailed line work, flat graphic design, symmetry, symmetry, perfect symmetry, clean composition, printable surface.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, debris, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, noise, gradients, photorealistic, harsh lighting, distracting elements
